narrative:
Wayne (precinct in Clinton County) has 419 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 54.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 5.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 49.6 percentage points.
